sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95776" key="sparto/dtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπαρτόδτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δέω</foreign> A) <sense id="n95776.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bound with</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σπάρτος</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:156" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.156</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:415" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.415</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
